priority.title: Fermi (FRMI) Stock Surges 26% on OpenAI Project Matador Power Deal Speculation - Blockonomi
priority.summary: Fermi (FRMI) stock soared 26% after reports emerged that OpenAI is evaluating its Project Matador AI power campus. JMP Citizens sees a major lease ahead.
priority.excerpt: The upward movement followed commentary from analyst firm JMP Citizens, which suggested that OpenAI is among multiple parties currently evaluating capacity at Project Matador, with the possibility of a substantial commercial agreement on the horizon. Project Matador represents a large-scale AI infrastructure site powered by natural gas. Fermi plans to bring approximately 1.1 GW of additional power capacity online by the conclusion of 2026.

priority.title: Fermi (FRMI) Jumps After OpenAI Data Center Report; Project Matador Lease Bets Return - TechStock²
priority.summary: Fermi shares soared 22.6% to $6.89 after a report that OpenAI may lease a massive Nvidia-backed Ohio data center, fueling hopes for Fermi’s own power-heavy AI campus
priority.excerpt: Fermi Inc. shares surged 22.6% to finish at $6.89 on Wednesday. The stock ticked up to $6.91 in early trading Thursday as traders looked for signs that big AI clients could still lock in massive, power-heavy data center contracts. The move wasn’t driven by a Fermi deal itself. Instead, OpenAI is reportedly talking to lease a 10-gigawatt data center project in Ohio, with Nvidia possibly backing it financially. That report put Fermi’s Project Matador back in play for the “power is the bottleneck” crowd. (d/b/a Fermi America) (NASDAQ & LSE: FRMI), operating as Fermi America™, today announced that it has secured a $165 million senior secured, first lien delayed draw term loan from CSG Investments, Inc., an affiliate of Beal Bank USA, to finance the remaining progress payments on its previously ordered six Siemens Energy SGT-800-57 gas turbines, with delivery scheduled in 2028. Investors who purchased Fermi (FRMI) securities pursuant and/or traceable to the company's October 2025 IPO, or between Oct. 1, 2025, and Dec. 11, 2025 , and suffered significant losses are encouraged to contact the firm.
